title: Academic 4Plus1 Accelerated Masters
content:
Special Programs
Morgan State University - Computer Science Department

4+1 ACCELERATED MASTER'S PROGRAM

Overview:
The 4+1 program allows undergraduate students to complete both their Bachelor's and Master's degrees in Computer Science in just 5 years (4 years undergraduate + 1 year graduate).

How It Works:
- Instead of taking some 400-level COSC/CLCO classes, take the corresponding 500-level graduate classes that are already "crosslisted" with the courses
- Graduate credits earned during undergraduate years count toward both degrees
- Saves time and money compared to traditional path

Benefits:
- Complete MS in just one additional year
- Begin graduate coursework while still an undergraduate
- Seamless transition from BS to MS
- Cost savings on graduate tuition

Eligibility:
- Contact your academic advisor for eligibility requirements
- Generally requires strong GPA
- Must meet graduate admission requirements

For details and questions, contact your academic advisor.
